channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Japan's Takaichi to pursue conservative agenda after election landslide
item.description: Japan's first female Prime Minister, Sanae Takaichi, brought the ruling Liberal Democratic Party its biggest-ever electoral victory, fueling her ambit...

item.title: Olympic COVID restrictions are gone, but some athletes are still self-quarantining
item.description: For most people, the pandemic days of masking are behind them. In certain corners of the Winter Olympics, though, things still look a lot like they di...

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin has battled grief, PTSD and freak injury. Now come the Olympic Games
item.description: Shiffrin became a celebrity at 18 years old after becoming the youngest-ever skier to win Olympic slalom gold. Since then, she has faced grief, PTSD a...

item.title: The latest on the search for Nancy Guthrie. And, takeaways from Super Bowl 60
item.description: The search for Nancy Guthrie enters a second week. And, the Seattle Seahawks win Super Bowl 60, beating the New England Patriots 29-13. Here are the h...

item.title: As US Olympians call for tolerance and LGBTQ rights, some face Trump attacks and online hate
item.description: President Trump called U.S. Olympic skier Hunter Hess a "loser" after Hess voiced concern about political turmoil in the U.S. Gold medal U.S. figure s...

item.title: Unredacted Epstein files now available to Congress for review
item.description: The Justice Department made unredacted Epstein files available to members of Congress on Monday. CBS News' Taurean Small has more.

item.title: Face the Nation: Omar, Vinograd, Krebs
item.description: Missed the second half of the show? The latest on...Dem. Rep. Ilhan Omar says that as the Trump administration has steamrolled forward with executive ...

item.title: Migrants languish in US detention centers facing dire conditions and prolonged waits
item.description: Prolonged detention has become more common in President Donald Trumpâs second term, at least partly because a new policy generally prohibits immigrati...

item.title: Celebrity appearances, controversial ads and other Super Bowl takeaways
item.description: Celebrities including Lady Gaga, Cardi B and Jessica Alba joined Bad Bunny's Super Bowl half time show.

item.title: Trial against Meta in New Mexico focuses on dangers of child sexual exploitation on social media
Epstein survivors call for full release of files in video
item.description: Millions of files relating to the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein have been released by the DOJ but many have redactions.

item.title: Fifteen killed in latest Lebanon building collapse, as warnings of neglect grow
item.description: Two blocks fall down in what is the fifth such disaster this winter, as warnings of neglect grow.

item.title: Migrant boat capsizes off Libya leaving 53 dead
item.description: The IOM says that almost 500 people have been reported dead or missing off Libya so far this year.

item.title: Ghislaine Maxwell pleads the Fifth, doesn't answer House panel's questions
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell invoked her Fifth Amendment right and refused to answer questions during a virtual appearance before the House Oversight Committee.

item.title: What are today's mortgage interest rates: February 9, 2026?
item.description: Want to buy a home or refinance the one you live in now? Here are the mortgage interest rates to know right now.

item.title: Maxwell won't answer questions from Congress, lawyer says
item.description: Ghislaine Maxwell, the jailed associate of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, will invoke her Fifth Amendment right to avoid self-incrimination.

item.title: Seahawks ride their stifling defense to dominant Super Bowl win over the Patriots
item.description: The Seattle Seahawks defeated the New England Patriots Sunday to win the 2026 Super Bowl.

item.title: Investigation continues a week after Savannah Guthrie mother was reported missing
